email_subject: Application for Logistics Administrator - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Logistics Administrator position at MICHAEL PAGE INTERNATIONAL (BELGIUM), as advertised. With hands-on experience in logistics operations at Katoen Natie and a strong background in administrative coordination, I am confident in my ability to support your team in Wavre.

In my previous role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment, handling inventory and shipment coordination. My technical skills in data entry, reporting, and process optimization complement my administrative experience. I am proficient in logistics software and tools, and I am detail-oriented, organized, and proactive in resolving issues.

I am eager to contribute to your client's pharma logistics operations and ensure timely, compliant deliveries. I am available to start immediately and look forward to discussing how my skills align with your needs.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Logistics Administrator position at MICHAEL PAGE INTERNATIONAL (BELGIUM), as advertised. With practical experience in logistics operations and a strong administrative skill set, I am well-prepared to support your client's pharma logistics team in Wavre.

During my tenure at Katoen Natie, a major logistics provider in Antwerp, I worked in a high-volume warehouse environment where accuracy and efficiency were paramount. I coordinated inbound and outbound shipments, maintained inventory records, and ensured timely documentation. This role honed my ability to manage multiple tasks under pressure while adhering to safety and regulatory requirements. I am comfortable with data entry, reporting, and using logistics software to track shipments and resolve issues.

My technical background includes proficiency in tools such as Google Analytics, SEMrush, and content management systems, which I have used to track performance and generate reports. I am highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in identifying and solving logistical challenges. I communicate effectively in English and Turkish, and I am currently improving my Dutch (A2 level).

I am drawn to this opportunity because it offers a chance to apply my logistics experience in the pharma sector, where precision and compliance are critical. I am eager to bring my organizational skills, problem-solving mindset, and dedication to efficiency to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to your client's operations.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie, maintaining accuracy and efficiency in high-volume logistics operations
Proficient in data entry, inventory record maintenance, and shipment coordination
Strong organizational and problem-solving skills, with attention to detail
Experience with reporting and performance tracking using analytics tools
Quick learner, adaptable to new software and processes, with a proactive attitude
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

Profile
Junior logistics and administrative professional with hands-on experience in warehouse operations and inventory management at Katoen Natie. Skilled in coordinating shipments, maintaining accurate records, and supporting logistics teams with data entry and reporting. Proficient in logistics software and tools, with strong organizational and problem-solving abilities. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

Core Skills
- Logistics & warehouse operations: inbound/outbound coordination, inventory management, shipment tracking, documentation (invoices, packing lists)
- Data entry & reporting: accurate record keeping, performance metrics, logistics software
- Organizational & problem-solving: multitasking in fast-paced environments, resolving logistical issues
- Communication: liaising with suppliers, transport providers, and internal teams
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

Experience

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Coordinated inbound and outbound shipments, ensuring timely delivery and accuracy of documentation
- Maintained and updated inventory records to align stock levels with operational requirements
- Supported the logistics team with administrative tasks and data entry

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide decisions
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress, including content uploads and page updates

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

Projects

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site with structured data and technical audits

Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References
Available on request.
